name: NextDNS Ads & Trackers Blocklist
description: A comprehensive blocklist to block ads & trackers in all countries. This is the recommended starter blocklist.

name: AdGuard DNS filter
description: A filter composed of several other filters (AdGuard Base filter, Social media filter, Tracking Protection filter, Mobile Ads filter, EasyList and EasyPrivacy) and simplified specifically to be better compatible with DNS-level ad blocking.

name: OISD
description: Internet's #1 domain blocklist. Blocks Ads, Mobile Ads, Phishing, Malvertising, Malware, Tracking, Telemetry, CryptoJacking, Analytics, Spyware, Ransomware, Exploit, Fraud, Abuse, Scam, Spam, Hijack, Misleading Marketing.

name: AdGuard Mobile Ads filter
description: Filter that blocks ads on mobile devices. Contains all known mobile ad networks.

name: EasyList
description: EasyList is the primary filter list that removes most adverts from international webpages, including unwanted frames, images and objects. It is the most popular list used by many ad blockers and forms the basis of over a dozen combination and supplementary filter lists.

name: AdGuard Tracking Protection filter
description: The most comprehensive list of various online counters and web analytics tools. If you do not want your actions on the Internet be tracked, use this filter.

name: Goodbye Ads
description: Specially Designed for Mobile Ad Protection.

name: Steven Black
description: Extending and consolidating hosts files from several well-curated sources like adaway.org, mvps.org, malwaredomainlist.com, someonewhocares.org, and potentially others.

name: AdGuard Base filter
description: Filter that enables removing of the ads from websites with English content.

name: EasyPrivacy
description: EasyPrivacy is an optional supplementary filter list that completely removes all forms of tracking from the internet, including web bugs, tracking scripts and information collectors, thereby protecting your personal data.

name: HaGeZi - Multi PRO++
description: Sweeper - Aggressive cleans the Internet and protects your privacy! Blocks Ads, Affiliate, Tracking, Metrics, Telemetry, Phishing, Malware, Scam, Fake, Coins and other Crap.

name: notracking
description: Automatically updated, moderated and optimized list for blocking ads, trackers and other online garbage.

name: Fanboy's Annoyance List
description: Fanboy's Annoyance List blocks Social Media content, in-page pop-ups and other annoyances; thereby substantially decreasing web page loading times and uncluttering them.

name: HaGeZi - Multi PRO
description: Big broom - Cleans the Internet and protects your privacy! Blocks Ads, Affiliate, Tracking, Metrics, Telemetry, Phishing, Malware, Scam, Fake, Coins and other Crap.

name: NSABlocklist
description: Block all known NSA / GCHQ / C.I.A. / F.B.I. spying servers. Originally based on 2007 published Wikileaks documents and includes my own modifications from 2008, 2012, 2014 and 2015.

name: AdAway
description: Blocking mobile ad providers and some analytics providers.

name: AdGuard Social Media filter
description: If you do not like numerous «Like» and «Tweet» buttons on all the popular websites on the Internet, subscribe to this filter, and you will not see them anymore.

name: Disconnect (Ads)
description: Free yourself from unwanted tracking. Enjoy a faster, safer internet.

name: someonewhocares.org (Dan Pollock)
description: Protects you from many types of spyware, reduces bandwidth use, blocks certain pop-up traps, prevents user tracking by way of "web bugs" embedded in spam, provides partial protection to IE from certain web-based exploits and blocks most advertising you would otherwise be subjected to on the internet.

name: HaGeZi - Multi NORMAL
description: Broom - Cleans the Internet and protects your privacy! Blocks Ads, Affiliate, Tracking, Metrics, Telemetry, Phishing, Malware, Scam, Fake, Coins and other Crap.

name: Lightswitch05 - Ads & Tracking
description: A programmatically expanded list of hosts used for advertisements and tracking. This is my primary list and I recommend using it.

name: HaGeZi - Multi ULTIMATE
description: Ultimate Sweeper - Strictly cleans the Internet and protects your privacy! Blocks Ads, Affiliate, Tracking (+Referral), Metrics, Telemetry, Phishing, Malware, Scam, Free Hoster, Fake, Coins and other Crap.

name: WindowsSpyBlocker (Spy)
description: Block spying and tracking on Windows systems.

name: NoTrack Tracker Blocklist
description: Contains one of the largest compilation of sites associated with tracking your online activities and invading your privacy.

name: Peter Lowe
description: Blocklist for use with hosts files to block ads.

name: hBlock
description: Improve your security and privacy by blocking ads, tracking and malware domains.

name: 1Hosts (Lite)
description: Safeguard your device(s) against pesky ads, trackers, and malware.

name: Disconnect (Tracking)
description: Free yourself from unwanted tracking. Enjoy a faster, safer internet.

name: Perflyst's Smart-TV Blocklist
description: Block smart-TVs sending metadata back home, sometimes with the added benefit of blocking interface ads for apps and movie services.

name: AdGuard Russian filter
description: Filter that enables removing of the ads from websites in Russian.

name: EasyList China
description: EasyList China is an affiliated filter list written by John and Li that specifically removes adverts on Chinese language websites.

name: 1Hosts (Pro)
description: Safeguard your device(s) against pesky ads, trackers, and malware.

name: Anudeep's Blacklist for ads and trackers
description: Curated and well-maintained hostfile to block ads, tracking, cryptomining, and more! Updated regularly.

name: Disconnect (Malvertising)
description: Free yourself from unwanted tracking. Enjoy a faster, safer internet.

name: anti-AD
description: anti-AD是目前中文区命中率最高的广告过滤列表，实现了精确的广告屏蔽和隐私保护。

name: Fanboy's Enhanced Tracking List
description: Fanboy's Enhanced Tracking List blocks common tracking scripts such as Omniture, Webtrends, Foresee, Coremetrics, Google-Analytics, Touchclarity, ChannelIntelligence.

name: HaGeZi - Multi LIGHT
description: Hand brush - Cleans the Internet and protects your privacy! Blocks Ads, Tracking, Metrics, some Malware and Fake.

name: EasyList Germany
description: EasyList Germany is a filter list written by the EasyList authors MonztA, Famlam and Khrin that specifically removes adverts on German language websites.

name: RU AdList
description: Russian supplement for EasyList.

name: Energized Ultimate
description: Comprehensive, full protection.

name: MVPS HOSTS
description: Includes entries for most major parasites, hijackers and unwanted Adware/Spyware programs!

name: hostsVN
description: Hosts block ads of Vietnamese - Hosts chặn quảng cáo của người Việt.

name: antipopads
description: List of popads.net domains.

name: Liste FR
description: Liste FR is an affiliated filter list written by Lian, Crits and smed79 that specifically removes adverts on French language websites.

name: CAMELEON
description: CAMELEON is a free system that helps Internet users or administrators to blocks web-adverts.

name: CHEF-KOCH's HOSTS Spotify Ad-Filter List
description: Blocks all Spotify Ads, easy peasy lemon squeezy!

name: UncheckyAds
description: Windows installers ads sources.

name: ABPVN List
description: The ABP advertising filter is built with the mission of improving the browsing experience for users and for the Vietnamese.

name: 280blocker
description: 280blocker adblock domain lists.

name: YousList
description: Block filter for advertisements, mainly on Korean sites.

name: AdAway Blocking Hosts File for Japan
description: AdAwayで使用可能な、日本環境用 広告除去用hostsを公開します。日本環境用に特化しています。

name: EasyList Italy
description: EasyList Italy is a filter list written by the EasyList author Khrin that specifically removes adverts on Italian language websites.

name: EasyList Dutch
description: EasyList Dutch is an affiliated filter list written by the EasyList author Famlam that specifically removes adverts on Dutch language websites.

name: Shalla's Blacklists (tracker)
description: Site keeping an eye on where you surf and what you do in a passive. Covers web bugs, counters and other tracking mechanism in web pages that do not interfere with the local computer yet collecting information about the surfing person for later analyis. Sites actively spying out the surfer by installing software or calling home sites are not covered with tracker but with -> spyware.

name: Shalla's Blacklists (adv)
description: All about advertising: This includes sites offering banners and banner creation as well as sites delivering banners to be shown in webpages. Advertising companies are listed, too.

name: Energized Regional Extension
description: Regional filtering.

name: Lightswitch05 - Tracking Aggressive
description: A very aggressive block list for tracking, geo-targeting, & ads. This list will likely break functionality, so do not use it unless you are willing to maintain your own whitelist.

name: 1Hosts (mini)
description: Safeguard your device(s) against pesky ads, trackers, and malware.

name: ABPindo
description: ABPindo is an affiliated filter list written by hermawan that specifically removes adverts on Indonesian language websites.

name: Energized Blu
description: Balanced, extended protection.

name: 1Hosts (Xtra)
description: Safeguard your device(s) against pesky ads, trackers, and malware.

name: add.2o7Net
description: 2o7 Network tracking.

name: Energized Basic
description: Strictly blocks advertisements, malwares, spams, statistics & trackers on both web browsing and applications. An All-Rounder Balanced Protection Pack.

name: CertyficateIT
description: Polish ads filter.

name: Personal Blocklist by WaLLy3K
description: Content added to this list has been manually verified, and is updated irregularly.

name: Energized Blu Go
description: Strictly blocks advertisements, malwares, spams, statistics & trackers on both web browsing and applications. A Lightweight Mid Ranger Protection Pack.

name: Liste AR
description: Liste AR is an affiliated filter list written by smed79 and Crits that specifically removes adverts on Arabic language websites.

name: BarbBlock
description: Block sites which have used DMCA takedowns to force removal from other content blocking lists. Such takedowns are categorically invalid, but they can be effective at intimidating small open-source projects into compliance.

name: EasyList Hebrew
description: EasyList Hebrew is an affiliated filter list written by BsT that specifically removes adverts on Hebrew language websites.

name: Finnish Easylist Addition
description: Finnish adblock list.

name: Frellwit's Swedish Hosts File
description: Reduce your exposure to ads, tracking, scams & badware, and occasionally some annoyances on (mostly) Swedish websites.

name: bkrucarci turk-adlist
description: Ad servers list to block ads on Turkish websites.

name: Energized Spark
description: Lightweight, essential protection.

name: EasyList Czech and Slovak
description: EasyList Czech and Slovak is an affiliated filter list written by tomasko126 that specifically removes adverts on Czech and Slovak language websites.

name: ad-wars
description: 只是 ad-wars 的帮助文档

name: hufilter
description: Block hungarian ads.

name: Energized Extreme Extension
description: Enhanced privacy with aggressive filtering.

name: No Facebook
description: Completely block Facebook and the services it owns (WhatsApp, Instagram).

name: EasyList Lithuania
description: EasyList Lithuania is an affiliated filter list written by gymka that specifically removes adverts on Lithuanian language websites.

name: Bulgarian list
description: Bulgarian list is an affiliated filter list written by Alex that specifically removes adverts on Bulgarian language websites.
